channel.title: DotWeaver
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
DotWeaver v1.0.0 - Initial Release

✨ New Features

  • Native SwiftUI macOS application
  • Support for 9 storage providers (Git, iCloud, OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, WebDAV, SFTP, FTPS, S3)
  • Touch ID / Face ID biometric authentication with passcode fallback
  • Secure Enclave optional private key for signing operations
  • Built-in file editor with syntax highlighting
  • Template system (Chezmoi-style)
  • Full CLI tool (dotweaver)
  • Homebrew installation support
  • Automatic updates via Sparkle

🔒 Security

  • App Sandbox with Home Folder Access only
  • Keychain integration with Access Groups
  • Certificate pinning for network security
  • Zero telemetry - your data stays private

📦 Installation

brew tap rausth/dotweaver
brew install dotweaver

Full Changelog: View on GitHub
